languages.text: "О, драгоценный мой палач, вы и вообразить не можете, как долго я ждал{mf||а} этой минуты!"

traits.locale_text: "О, драгоценный мой палач, вы и вообразить не можете, как долго я ждал{mf||а} этой минуты!"

languages.text: "Oh, my precious executioner, you cannot imagine how long I have waited for this moment!"
languages.original_text: "О, драгоценный мой палач, вы и вообразить не можете, как долго я ждал{mf||а} этой минуты!"

traits.locale_text: "Oh, my precious executioner, you cannot imagine how long I have waited for this moment!"
"Oh, my precious executioner, you cannot imagine how long I have waited for this moment!"
"Oh, my precious executioner, you cannot imagine how long I have waited for this moment!"

languages.text: “噢，我亲爱的行刑者，你根本想象不到我等这一刻等了多久！”
languages.original_text: "Oh, my precious executioner, you cannot imagine how long I have waited for this moment!"

traits.locale_text: “噢，我亲爱的行刑者，你根本想象不到我等这一刻等了多久！”

languages.text: « Oh, mon précieux exécuteur, vous n'imaginez pas depuis combien de temps j'attends ce moment ! »
languages.original_text: "Oh, my precious executioner, you cannot imagine how long I have waited for this moment!"

traits.locale_text: « Oh, mon précieux exécuteur, vous n'imaginez pas depuis combien de temps j'attends ce moment ! »

languages.text: "Benim kıymetli celladım, bu an için ne kadar beklediğimi hayal bile edemezsin!"
languages.original_text: "Oh, my precious executioner, you cannot imagine how long I have waited for this moment!"

traits.locale_text: "Benim kıymetli celladım, bu an için ne kadar beklediğimi hayal bile edemezsin!"

languages.text: «¡Oh, mi querido verdugo, no se imagina cuánto he esperado este momento!».
languages.original_text: "Oh, my precious executioner, you cannot imagine how long I have waited for this moment!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Oh, mi querido verdugo, no se imagina cuánto he esperado este momento!».

languages.text: "Oh, mein geschätzter Henker, Ihr ahnt nicht, wie lange ich auf diesen Moment gewartet habe!"
languages.original_text: "Oh, my precious executioner, you cannot imagine how long I have waited for this moment!"

traits.locale_text: "Oh, mein geschätzter Henker, Ihr ahnt nicht, wie lange ich auf diesen Moment gewartet habe!"

languages.text: 「ああ、私の大切な処刑人よ、この瞬間を待ちわびてきたことの長さを、あなたは想像もできないわ！」
languages.original_text: "Oh, my precious executioner, you cannot imagine how long I have waited for this moment!"

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、私の大切な処刑人よ、この瞬間を待ちわびてきたことの長さを、あなたは想像もできないわ！」
